title: THROTTLE UP
instructions: Put the steps in the correct order to reach takeoff speed!
dragInstruction: Drag steps into the correct order to accelerate
howToPlayBody: Drag the step cards into the sequence slots in the correct order. Each correct placement accelerates the plane. Incorrect placements slow it down. Once all steps are correct and you reach takeoff speed, the plane lifts off!
disclosure: Results are stored locally in your browser.
